title: Sutton's predictions v Blossoms & Songer
snippet: Chris Sutton takes on indie band Blossoms and rapper Songer plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for the FA Cup final and this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

title: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
snippet: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

title: Has last-gasp Celtic penalty undermined Hearts' hopes?
snippet: As the curtain falls on an incredible Scottish Premiership season, Celtic and Hearts go head-to-head on Saturday with the title on the line.

title: Zack Polanski did not vote in local elections, Green Party says
snippet: The Green Party leader previously told Hackney mayoral candidate Zoë Garbett "you have my vote".

title: Madonna, Shakira & BTS to headline World Cup half-time show
snippet: Madonna, Shakira and K-pop boy band BTS will headline the Super Bowl-style half-time show at this summer's World Cup final.

title: 'Don't swim' at 12 of 14 river bathing sites, as more locations announced
snippet: Too much bacteria linked to faeces found at almost all England's designated river bathing sites

title: CIA chief visits Cuba as energy crisis worsens
snippet: The reported visit to Havana came after the US renewed an offer of aid to ease the effects of its oil blockade.

title: US Border Patrol chief Michael Banks resigns
snippet: "It's just time," he told Fox News, adding that his resignation is effective immediately.

title: Five Italians die during cave scuba dive in Maldives
snippet: Four of the Italians were part of a team from the University of Genoa.

title: Trump brought top CEOs to Beijing but few big deals emerge
snippet: There were plenty of choreographed ceremonies but no sweeping trade breakthroughs.

title: How I fell victim to 'ghost' insurance broker scam
snippet: Amie Donaghey is among thousands of victims of "ghost brokers" who sell fake insurance on social media.

title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
snippet: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.

title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble of Kyiv flats after massive Russian strikes
snippet: Two children are among at least 16 killed in Ukraine's capital in massive Russian drone and missile attacks, officials say.

title: Three more VAR errors confirmed by Premier League panel
snippet: Three more video assistant referee errors are confirmed by the Premier League's Key Match Incidents panel, taking the total number this season to 23.

title: Posh sandwich has more salt than nearly five cheeseburgers
snippet: Action on Salt & Sugar said people should not be exposed to a "hidden health risk every time they buy lunch".
